list.title: Departments
list.resultsDescription: Browse the departments available in the hospital.

details.title: Department details
details.description: Review department information, doctors, and rooms.
details.notFoundDescription: This department is no longer available.
details.noDoctorsDescription: This department does not have doctors assigned yet.
details.noRoomsDescription: This department does not have rooms assigned yet.
details.loadingDoctorsDescription: Please wait while doctor assignments are loaded.
details.loadingRoomsDescription: Please wait while room assignments are loaded.

form.formDescription: Fill in the department details below.

states.emptyDescription: Create a department to get started.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.errorDescription: We could not load department data.

errors.list: We could not load the departments list.
errors.details: We could not load this department.
errors.save: We could not save the department.
errors.delete: We could not delete the department.
errors.doctors: We could not load the doctors for this department.
errors.rooms: We could not load the rooms for this department.
